calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Francisco Torres, counsel for plaintiff John Stewart Company; Wes Flowers, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Hope Lincoln Greenhill, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant Eleonora Robinson, who is also present.

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 516 O'Farrell Street, #510, San Francisco, California. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
